---
title: "Audio or Video Device Selection During Interview"

mode: "custom"
---

<style dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{__html: `
  #sidebar, nav[aria-label="Pages"] { display: none !important; }
  main, [class*="lg:pl-72"] { padding-left: 0 !important; margin-left: 0 !important; }
  [data-testid*="search" i], button[aria-label*="search" i], .search-trigger { display: none !important; }
`}} />


### Selecting Audio or Video Device During an Interview

#### Prerequisites

- The interviewer and the candidate must ensure that browser or system permissions are granted to use the microphone and/or webcam during the interview.

#### Steps

- When you start a call during the interview, a pop-up window will appear, prompting you to select devices for your webcam, microphone, and speakers.
- A drop-down menu will list the available devices on your computer. From the available devices, select the preferred webcam, microphone, or speakers.

<Frame>
  <img src="/images/audio-or-video-device-selection-during-interview/bf02d93c64b1e4fc.bin" alt="image" />
</Frame>

- Click the expand icon in the call window to enlarge the video view for better visibility.

<Frame>
  <img src="/images/audio-or-video-device-selection-during-interview/3e47fe09b04f7596.bin" alt="image" />
</Frame>

- If you encounter any issues with your selected device during the interview, you can quickly switch to a different device using the Audio/Video option in the interview settings.

<!-- IMAGE NOT AVAILABLE: data:image/png;base64, -->

- The compressed version of the call window is a floating window, which you can move around during the interview to ensure it doesn't obstruct your view while the candidate is coding.
